# PDL v1.0 — Programmable Data License

> ZWISERFIT Behavior Data License | World's first programmable license for human physical behavior data
> **对标:** Story Protocol PIL ($2.25B) — chain-off legal + chain-on parameter dual architecture
> **创新:** 5-tier permission classification for behavior data | Door-access anti-forgery | 14 on-chain parameters

---

## Architecture

```
CHAIN-OFF (Legal)              CHAIN-ON (Smart Contract)
├── Human-readable             ├── 14 programmable parameters
├── Enforceable (HK/SG law)    ├── MPC signature enforcement
├── 5-tier: L0→L4             ├── On-chain audit trail
└── DRM3-aligned               └── Hash registration
```

## Quick Reference

| Tier | Name | Permissions | Requirements |
|:----:|------|------------|-------------|
| **L0** | Public Research | Statistical aggregates only | Attribution |
| **L1** | Academic | Anonymized individual records | IRB + research protocol |
| **L2** | Commercial Internal | Internal analytics, no resale | Business verification |
| **L3** | Commercial Derivative | Derivative products, revenue share | L2 + 5-15% revenue share |
| **L4** | Exclusive Partner | Custom terms | L3 + exclusivity premium |

## Data Subject Rights (DRM3-Aligned)

| Right | Mechanism |
|-------|-----------|
| **Know** | Real-time notification of every license grant |
| **Revoke** | MPC signature within 72h |
| **Audit** | Independent Stella-verified audit |
| **Erasure** | GDPR Art.17 compatible deletion |
| **Compensation** | Smart contract automated revenue distribution |

## 23andMe Anti-Pattern Safeguards

This PDL embeds defenses against the 5 fatal errors that destroyed 23andMe ($6B→$16M):

| Error | PDL Safeguard |
|-------|--------------|
| Vague authorization | Tiered permissions + precise definitions |
| Single buyer dependency | Multi-tier enables diversified licensee portfolio |
| One-time data snapshot | Continuous data streaming (every gym visit) |
| Burn cash for scale | Verify unit economics at 1 node first |
| Bankruptcy = data sale | §6: data returns to Subjects, not creditors |

## License Compatibility

- Story Protocol PIL — Dual architecture alignment
- Creative Commons (conceptual) — Tiered model mirrors CC BY/NC/SA logic
- GDPR Art. 6-9 — Explicit consent via MPC signature
- DRM3 Framework — All four principles mapped
